mapper.select: select * from patient_profile where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into patient_profile(user_id, real_name, id_card, gender, age, blood_type, allergy_history, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{realName}, #{idCard}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{bloodType}, #{allergyHistory}, #{emergencyContact}, #{emergencyPhone}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
